message:
fix(fcp-async-core): remove TLS re-exports and prune WebSocket wildcard imports

Remove the tls module re-exports from fcp-async-core since the tls
feature is not enabled on the asupersync dependency. Crates needing TLS
should depend on asupersync directly with the tls or tls-native-roots
feature. Prune WebSocket module wildcard re-exports (WsConfig,
client::*) to only re-export types that are actually available without
optional features. Add explanatory NOTE doc comment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -256,7 +256,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "asupersync"
-version = "0.2.7"
+version = "0.2.8"
 dependencies = [
  "base64 0.22.1",
  "bincode-next",
@@ -4632,7 +4632,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "franken-decision"
-version = "0.2.7"
+version = "0.2.8"
 dependencies = [
  "franken-evidence",
  "franken-kernel",
@@ -4641,15 +4641,15 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "franken-evidence"
-version = "0.2.7"
+version = "0.2.8"
 dependencies = [
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
 name = "franken-kernel"
-version = "0.2.7"
+version = "0.2.8"
 dependencies = [
  "serde",
 ]
